evaluationPolicies: Read ratings worst-of within an area; balance-invariants is the named veto requirement.
A not-assessed result stays visible as missing evidence and never counts as a low rating.

expectedEvaluationLimits.description: This is an illustrative gallery evaluation: routine outputs are synthetic and the concrete source system behind the synthetic-source references is omitted.
expectedEvaluationLimits.impact: Evidence references demonstrate report shape rather than checkable source claims.
